items.title: Per-page theme presets — the release that changes theming in TYPO3
items.description: Any page subtree can now run its own shadcn theme preset, inherited down the rootline and switched at runtime. Campaign pages in Midnight, the rest of the site on Aurora — the seeded styleguide flaunts a different theme on every chapter page.

items.title: Seeder services: a full demo site, rebuilt anytime
items.description: The styleguide and starter seeders are now dedicated services with functional test coverage. Still one command, still workspaces-safe and idempotent — run it after every upgrade and your demo content refreshes in place.

items.title: Friendly Captcha placeholder fallback
items.description: Forms using Friendly Captcha now render a clean demo placeholder when no site key is configured — seeded demo sites look polished out of the box, never broken.

items.title: Fluid 5 strict components, zero runtime baggage
items.description: All 49 components moved to strict Fluid 5 ViewHelpers under the d: namespace, and the Alpine.js runtime was dropped for lean vanilla glue code. Faster pages, stricter templates — update custom templates before upgrading.
